docdb.dbsubnetgroup.DBSubnetGroupDescrip.Description: The description for the subnet group.

docdb.dbsubnetgroup.DBSubnetGroupName.Description: The name for the subnet group. This value is stored as a lowercase string.  Constraints: Must contain no more than 255 letters, numbers, periods, underscores, spaces, or hyphens. Must not be default.  Example: `mySubnetgroup`

docdb.dbsubnetgroup.SubnetIds.Description: The Amazon EC2 subnet IDs for the subnet group.

docdb.dbsubnetgroup.Tags.Description: The tags to be assigned to the subnet group.
